title: Consulting Services Agreement between Pinnacle Advisory and Greenfield Manufacturing

drafting_sequence.clause_text: Pinnacle Advisory Group ('Consultant') shall provide strategic management consulting services to Greenfield Manufacturing Corp ('Client') including organizational restructuring analysis, operational efficiency assessments, and executive coaching programs as detailed in Exhibit A.
This Agreement shall commence on the Effective Date and continue for a period of twelve (12) months unless terminated earlier in accordance with the provisions herein.

Client shall pay Consultant a fixed monthly retainer of $25,000 (Twenty-Five Thousand Dollars) payable within thirty (30) days of receipt of each monthly invoice. All fees are exclusive of applicable taxes and reimbursable expenses.

All invoices submitted by Consultant shall be paid by Client within fifteen (15) business days of the invoice date. Late payments shall accrue interest at a rate of 1.5% per month on the outstanding balance.
drafting_sequence.contradiction_description: Clause 03 requires monthly retainer invoices to be paid within 30 days of receipt, while Clause 04 requires all invoices to be paid within 15 business days of invoice date. These are incompatible payment deadlines for the same invoice obligation.

drafting_sequence.clause_text: All work product, deliverables, reports, and materials created by Consultant in the course of performing services under this Agreement shall be the exclusive property of Client. Consultant hereby assigns all rights, title, and interest in such work product to Client.

Either party may terminate this Agreement by providing sixty (60) days written notice to the other party. Upon termination, Client shall pay Consultant for all services rendered and expenses incurred through the effective date of termination.
In no event shall Consultant's aggregate liability under this Agreement exceed the total fees paid by Client during the six (6) month period immediately preceding the claim.

This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of New York. Any dispute shall be resolved through binding arbitration in New York City under the rules of the American Arbitration Association.
